title: Use of Therapeutic Apheresis methods in Neurology patients.
abstract: The therapeutic apheresis consists of a continuously improving therapeutic method for diseases with high mortality and morbidity, especially in cases with poor outcome by using current medications. Neurology is one the most famous and at the same most interesting era of apheresis intervention in clinical practice.
journal: Transfusion and apheresis science : official journal of the World Apheresis Association : official journal of the European Society for Haemapheresis
